evaluators.name: Earliest Morning Type 1 Diabetes Appointment Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted a new-patient appointment request for Type 1 diabetes at Main Clinic – Downtown using the earliest available morning slot.

evaluators.name: First Qualifying Spanish-Speaking Thyroid Doctor Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user selected the first doctor who treats thyroid disorders, speaks Spanish, and has ≥10 years of experience.

evaluators.name: Earliest Evening Insulin Pump Class Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user registered for the earliest insulin pump education class within 60 days that starts at or after 5:00 PM, for one child and one parent.

evaluators.name: Saved Recent Easy GHD Articles Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user saved the first two easy-reading Growth Hormone Deficiency articles from the last 2 years into their saved resources.

evaluators.name: Growth Calculator and Print View Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user calculated height percentile for a school-age girl with specified values and opened the print-friendly view for that calculation.

evaluators.name: Silver HMO Insurance and Billing Question Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user identified a silver-tier HMO plan requiring referrals and submitted a billing question confirming the pediatric endocrinology specialist co-pay for that plan.

evaluators.name: Levothyroxine Refill to Nearest Pharmacy Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user requested a refill for levothyroxine 50 mcg tablets for an existing patient, using the nearest pharmacy within 5 miles of ZIP 10027 and the earliest available pickup time at or after 4:00 PM today.

evaluators.name: Early Puberty New Patient Intake Questionnaire Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user completed and submitted the online new pediatric endocrine intake form with early puberty as the primary concern, including required demographic, contact, visit date, and background information.
